title: Manual source pipeline idempotency through reconcile-scores
problem: Ticket-105 unified the manual synthnote e2e proof through reconcile-scores. tests/unit/test_manual_source_pipeline_idempotency.py still covers only the five-step spine (ticket-093). Re-running follow-up ingest, extract-claims, and reconcile-scores should leave stable row counts.
acceptance_criteria: Idempotency test runs full spine plus follow-up reconcile-scores twice with stable score_events and relationship confidence.
No production code or golden test changes.
non_goals: No live Ollama, export, schema migration, or doc changes.
